description:
Check the status of a PDF document generation for a Commitment Change Order Batch.
Note: This endpoint is currently only supported in Procore Zones US01 && US02.

parameters.name: commitment_co_batch_id
parameters.description: Unique identifier for the Commitment Change Order Batch.

400.description: Bad Request, indicates that the generation was unsuccessful

404.description: Not Found, job not found (PDF generation has expired, or never started).
